summary: Completed testing of iteration 10 features: Provider services_offered with service details (price, pet sizes, description), always_active availability flag, search filters by service_type + dates, PUT /providers/my-profile, PUT /providers/my-services. FIXED critical route ordering bug where /providers/my-profile was being captured by /providers/{provider_id} route. All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified with service tabs, date picker, and registration form.

issues: Google Maps API error: RefererNotAllowedMapError - domain not authorized. This is a Google Cloud Console configuration issue, not a code bug.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=paseo - returns 2 providers with paseo service
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=alojamiento - returns 2 providers with alojamiento service
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=guarderia - returns 2 providers with guarderia service
Backend: GET /api/providers - returns all 5+ approved providers
Backend: GET /api/providers?dates=2026-03-01 - always_active providers appear (all 5)
Backend: GET /api/providers?dates=2026-03-01,2026-03-02,2026-03-03 - multiple dates filter works
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=paseo&dates=2026-03-01 - combined filters work
Backend: GET /api/providers/my-profile - returns authenticated provider profile with services
Backend: PUT /api/providers/my-profile - updates always_active and available_dates
Backend: PUT /api/providers/my-services - updates services list for provider
Backend: GET /api/admin/metrics - returns 6 months time-series data
Backend: POST /api/providers - creates provider with services_offered array
Backend: Providers have always_active field
Backend: Services have pet_sizes array field
Frontend: Search page - 4 service tabs (Todos, Alojamiento, Guarderia, Paseo)
Frontend: Search page - Date picker trigger present
Frontend: Search page - Calendar shows 2 months (febrero/marzo 2026)
Frontend: Search page - Provider cards show pet sizes (Pequeno, Mediano, Grande)
Frontend: Search page - Filtering by Paseo tab works (shows 2 cuidadores)
Frontend: Provider registration - Title 'Registra tu Perfil de Cuidador'
Frontend: Provider registration - Service checkboxes (Alojamiento, Guarderia, Paseo)
Frontend: Provider registration - 'Siempre activo' checkbox with description
Frontend: Provider registration - All form inputs present (name, address, comuna, phone)

bugs_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering bug - /providers/{provider_id} was defined BEFORE /providers/my-profile, causing 'my-profile' to be captured as a provider_id parameter
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved /providers/my-profile and /providers/my-services endpoints to be defined BEFORE /providers/{provider_id} in server.py

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in FastAPI is important - specific routes must come before parameterized routes
Google Maps API key needs domain authorization for https://admin-residence-maps.preview.emergentagent.com
seed_data_creation: Multiple test providers created during testing with services_offered array. All have always_active=True. Clean up recommended for production.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features tested: (1) Provider services_offered with service details - POST /providers accepts array of {service_type, price_from, description, rules, pet_sizes}. (2) always_active flag - providers can set availability to always active or specific dates. (3) Search filters - GET /providers?service_type=X&dates=Y works correctly. always_active providers always appear. (4) PUT /providers/my-profile and PUT /providers/my-services now working after fixing route ordering bug. (5) Frontend verified: service tabs, date picker, registration form with service checkboxes and 'Siempre activo'. Admin credentials: admin@ucan.cl / admin123. Google Maps API error is expected (domain not authorized).

features_tested.provider_creation: POST /api/providers with services_offered array creates provider + services
features_tested.frontend_service_tabs: Todos, Alojamiento, Guarderia, Paseo tabs filter providers
features_tested.frontend_date_picker: Calendar popover for date selection present
features_tested.frontend_provider_registration: Service checkboxes, 'Siempre activo', all form inputs working
